_note: Deliberate stub. The full TOOI organisaties register has tens of thousands of entries (rwc_overheidsorganisatie_compleet + rwc_zbo_compleet + rwp_overige_overheidsorganisaties_peildatum) and is too large to ship as a synchronous bundle. The publication-export dialog accepts free-text for opsteller / verantwoordelijke at V1 — when post-auth org context exists (#33), this list should be lazy-loaded against the resolver at https://identifier.overheid.nl/tooi/.
